ksa_text: Knowledge of Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) methodology, including triggering conditions, risk evaluation techniques, individual impact assessment, residual risk documentation, and supervisory authority reporting standards.

ddat.top_element_label: Applying statistical and analytical tools and techniques

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data remediation tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of data remediation tools and techniques
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Applying statistical and analytical tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-009 (SP, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4384 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.438, nice=0.434, nist_ai_rmf=0.431) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4384 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-K-009 (composite 0.4384) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.4384 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.4384 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4384, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
